response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a food allergen that can cause severe reactions in some individuals  
the immune system of people allergic to peanuts may react to the proteins in peanuts  
this reaction can lead to symptoms such as hives or difficulty breathing  
these symptoms can be life-threatening and require immediate medical attention  
the reason people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater is due to the lack of oxygen in water  
oxygen is essential for the body to function properly and survive in water  
without sufficient oxygen, the body cannot maintain normal functions  
this makes it impossible for people with peanut allergies to live underwater  

Sec. 2  
the human body requires a certain level of oxygen to sustain life  
oxygen is essential for cellular respiration and energy production  
in water, the oxygen levels are much lower than in air  
this reduces the availability of oxygen needed for survival  
the lack of oxygen in water makes it difficult for people with peanut allergies to live underwater  
the body cannot function properly without adequate oxygen supply  
this is why people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater
